expectations.text: Command includes proper method (POST) and body structure for creating user
expectations.evidence: userCommand.ts uses HttpMethod.POST and body includes name and email fields

expectations.text: Query includes condition builder (eq) for fetching by ID
expectations.evidence: userQuery.ts uses aggregateId() condition builder for fetching by ID

expectations.text: Includes proper TypeScript typing for command request and result
expectations.evidence: userCommand.ts defines CreateUserCommand as CommandRequest<CreateUser>, userQuery.ts has proper UserState interface
